steps.title: Identify the true subject
steps.content: The sentence's subject is "The writer Maya Angelou." The phrase "along with others such as Lorenzo Thomas and Gwendolyn Brooks" is a parenthetical addition — it does not change the subject from singular to plural. The verb must agree with the singular subject Maya Angelou, and the sentence describes a still-current association, so present tense is appropriate.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice, then confirm the answer
steps.content:
• "is": Singular present tense — agrees with the singular subject "Maya Angelou" and reflects her ongoing association with the Black Arts movement. ✓
  • "are": Plural present tense — does not agree with the singular subject "Maya Angelou." ✗
  • "were": Plural past tense — does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
  • "have been": Plural present-perfect form — does not agree with the singular subject "Maya Angelou." ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
